note: LIVE-data manifest for the lean-6module-v1.1 freshness gate. as_of pins to the LAST FULLY-SETTLED NASDAQ close = 2026-07-02 = $1769.32 (down -4.0% on the day). ASML reports in EUR; the as-of price is the NASDAQ USD line (the security verify_freshness.py re-fetches via ticker ASML). Every LIVE quantitative field carries >=2 independent sources; the gate re-fetches Yahoo (last close <= as_of => 1769.32) and cross-checks these declared sources + the decision_card value. shares/market_cap use the IDENTITY-CONSISTENT pair (385.42M x $1769.32 = $681.93B), NOT the stockanalysis $719.43B which uses a higher (~406M) share basis (flagged O3). FILED data (FY2025 reported 2026-01-28, Q1 2026 reported 2026-04-15) rides the dated-source claim_ledger discipline. LIVE-qualitative China export-control status uses the freshest sources (BIS/EUV-in-China June 2026; MATCH Act April 2026).

live_fields.note: Last settled NASDAQ close 2026-07-02 = $1769.32 (-11.5% off 52wk high $1,999.96; +159% off 52wk low $683.48). Not hugging either extreme -> no high/low-grab error. Down -4.0%/-$73.72 on the day (prev close $1,843.04).

Identity-consistent: 385.42M shares x $1769.32 = $681.9B, matching WallStreetZen's reported $681.93B (dated 2026-07-02). stockanalysis prints $719.43B on a higher (~406M) share basis -> NOT used (flagged O3); the delta is a share-count basis difference, not a price discrepancy.

WallStreetZen 385,417,665; AGM 2026 filing 388,147,674 issued - 3,224,029 treasury = 384,923,645 outstanding (record date 2026-03-25); stockanalysis 385.4M. Use ~385.42M for the mcap identity. Cross-source spread <0.2% (ex-treasury vs issued).

live_fields.value: FY2026 guidance RAISED at Q1 2026 print (2026-04-15): total net sales EUR36-40B (baseline ~EUR38B, up from EUR34-39B guided at Q4'25 2026-01-28); gross margin 51-53%; annualized effective tax rate ~17%. Q1 2026 actuals (net sales EUR8.8B, GM 53.0%, net income EUR2.8B, EPS EUR7.15) beat/at the high end; FY2025 was EUR32.7B sales / EUR9.6B net income / 52.8% GM / EUR24.73 EPS. Long-term Investor Day 2024 model: 2030 sales EUR44-60B, GM 56-60%. Next earnings 2026-07-15 (Q2 2026).

MATERIAL, LIVE, EVOLVING. (1) MATCH Act introduced April 2026 by bipartisan US lawmakers -> would ban ALL ASML DUV shipments to China (the permitted sales ~= 20% of 2026 revenue) and require the Netherlands to align export controls within 150 days or face unilateral US action -- status: pending legislation. (2) June 2026: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick alleged a possible unauthorized EUV transfer to a Chinese customer; ASML formally denies ('No indication of any ASML EUV System in China'; all 314 EUV machines accounted for). US cited EUV component/transport-equipment shipments -> BIS enforcement risk on COMPONENTS (does not require a full system; parallels the Applied Materials Feb 2026 settlement for components/units routed via Korea). (3) ASML has NEVER shipped EUV to China; NL has restricted DUV immersion tools since Jan 2023. China fell 33% (FY25) -> 19% (Q1'26) of system sales, with gross margin HELD (low-margin DUV replaced by high-margin AI EUV). This is the TOP kill-criterion (K-A).

No material ordinary-course litigation identified as thesis-relevant as of as_of. The one LIVE regulatory matter is the June 2026 US/BIS EUV-component-in-China allegation (see export_control_status), which ASML formally denies and which is an enforcement RISK, not a disclosed loss. No dual-class / governance litigation (one-share-one-vote; Stichting is a standard Dutch takeover defense).
